<!--
  Thanks for contributing to @deessejs/type-testing!
  Fill out the sections below. Keep PRs focused — one logical change per PR.
-->

## Description

<!-- What does this PR do, and why? Link any related issue with "Closes #123". -->

Closes #

## Type of change

<!-- Check all that apply. -->

- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix (non-breaking change that fixes an issue)
- [ ] ✨ New feature (non-breaking change that adds functionality)
- [ ] 💥 Breaking change (fix or feature that changes existing behavior/API)
- [ ] 📚 Documentation only
- [ ] 🧹 Chore / refactor / tooling (no runtime or type-surface change)

## Affected area

<!-- Check all that apply. -->

- [ ] types (`Equal`, `IsAny`, ...)
- [ ] api (`check` / `assert` / `expect`)
- [ ] runtime (type guards)
- [ ] vitest (matchers / setup)
- [ ] web (landing site)
- [ ] build / packaging / exports

## Checklist

- [ ] `pnpm test` passes
- [ ] `pnpm typecheck` passes
- [ ] `pnpm lint` passes
- [ ] A changeset was added (`pnpm changeset add`) if this changes the published package
- [ ] Tests were added or updated to cover the change (including the "should fail" direction for type utilities)
- [ ] Docs / README / JSDoc examples updated if the public API changed
- [ ] No unintended change to the public type surface or `exports` map

## Notes for reviewers

<!-- Anything reviewers should focus on, trade-offs made, or follow-ups deferred. -->
